title: [HW] Missing canonicalization/folder for `hw.struct_explode`
body:
`hw.struct_explode` should use the [same canonicalization/folding logic of `hw.struct_extract`](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/main/lib/Dialect/HW/HWOps.cpp#L2132) to eventually remove any redundant `hw.struct_create` operands.

Example:
```mlir
hw.module @foo(%arg: i32, %arg1 : i32) -> (out1: i32, out2: i32) {
    %0 = hw.struct_create (%arg, %arg1) : !hw.struct<field0: i32, field1: i32>
    %1:2 = hw.struct_explode %0 : !hw.struct<field0: i32, field1: i32>
    hw.output %1#0, %1#1 : i32, i32
}
```
should eventually canonicalize to removing both struct operations.
